channel.title: The Scribe's Chamber on the KING's Scribe, 7
channel.description: Recent content in The Scribe's Chamber on the KING's Scribe, 7

item.title: College of Scribes
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description: Instruction and Research. Equipping of Scribes in hallowed halls for governed learning.

item.title: Treasury
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description: Wealth. Provision. Finance. To sustain the KING's Business in the Earth realms.

item.title: The KING's Courts
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description: The KING's Courts are like bureaus/ministries within His Government. They include the Court of Angels, Court of Scribes, Courts of Law, The Treasury, The War Council, Bureau of Welfare, Colleges of Education, Entertainment, and so much more.

item.title: Studio
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Dip in the river of creative liberty in the Holy Spirit. Art, Designs, Podcasts, Books & more.

Studio, brah!

  1. Teachings
  2. Podcasts
  3. Comics
  4. Books
  5. Tracts & Pamphlets
  6. “the Ark Prints”
  7. AI Dev & Cr8v

item.title: Scrolls
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description: A collection of mysteries from the chambers of the KING's Scribe, 7.
